stemHtml: Which of the following statements about tailplanes is correct?A T-tail is...

options.a: more stabilising than a low tailplane because it is less affected by downwash behind the wings.
options.b: less stabilising than a low tailplane because it is less affected by downwash behind the wings.
options.c: less stabilising than a low tailplane because it is more affected by downwash behind the wings.
options.d: more stabilising than a low tailplane because it is more affected by downwash behind the wings.
